title: orchis latifolia var. elatior
intro: Orchis latifolia var. elatior, also known as the greater twayblade, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Orchis latifolia var. elatior include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related issues due to its diuretic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
